title: Postnuptial Agreement (Simple)
description: Agreement executed after marriage, defining asset separation and marital property allocations.
whatsCovered: Redefining joint marital assets as separate property
Allocation of debts accumulated during the marriage
Provisions for estate planning and wills
Affirmation that the agreement is signed voluntarily
whenToUse: Use this postnuptial agreement to clarify asset ownership or split business holdings during marriage, prior to any separation.

clauses.heading: POSTNUPTIAL AGREEMENT (SIMPLE)
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Postnuptial Agreement (Simple). The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Marital Asset Redefinition
clauses.body: Married partners (marriage date: {marriage_date}) agree to redefine joint marital assets as separate property to clarify estate planning.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
